name: Co-Investigator Workflow
description: Validates explicit planning, workflow transparency, and evidence-backed structured synthesis.

parts.text: Find researchers who have published on idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis treatment in the last 3 years and summarize the evidence.

## Request
Find researchers who have published on idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis treatment in the last 3 years.

## Plan
1. Define scope and inclusion criteria
2. Gather publication/trial evidence
3. Synthesize ranked researcher summary

## Executed Steps
- Scope and criteria defined
- Evidence gathered from literature and/or clinical data
- Structured synthesis completed

## Evidence
Includes source citations such as PMIDs and trial IDs where available.

## Findings
Provides a shortlist of active researchers with rationale and caveats.

## Limitations
Coverage depends on available APIs and indexing latency.

## Next Actions
Propose follow-up validation and expanded search.

args.query: idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis treatment last 3 years authors
